summary: Iteration 176 - Fixed 3 chat UI bugs: Pro Lounge visibility, message routing, and avatar caching. Backend fix applied to messages.py to exclude Comp Surfer from Pro Lounge access. Frontend fix applied to MessagesPage.js to remove admin fallback for Pro Lounge visibility.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Backend messages.py lines 478-480 - Changed is_current_user_pro to only check for ['Pro', 'God'] roles, removing admin fallback
FIXED: Backend messages.py lines 521-524 - Changed is_other_pro to only check for ['Pro', 'God'] roles, removing admin fallback
FIXED: Frontend MessagesPage.js line 60 - Changed isPro to use isProRole(roleToCheck) only, removing isAdmin fallback
VERIFIED: Avatar cache-busting working correctly with ?t= parameter in both fetchStories and ConversationItem
VERIFIED: Message routing correctly sends non-follower messages to 'requests' folder based on follow status check in get_or_create_conversation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 176 fixed 3 chat UI bugs. Key changes: 1) Backend messages.py now only grants Pro Lounge access to 'Pro' or 'God' roles (not any admin), 2) Frontend MessagesPage.js getFolders() now uses isProRole() without admin fallback, 3) Avatar cache-busting verified working with ?t= parameter. Test users: kelly@surf.com (Pro, should see Pro Lounge), dpritzker0905@gmail.com (Comp Surfer admin, should NOT see Pro Lounge).

pro_lounge_visibility.description: Pro Lounge folder only visible to Pro and God roles
pro_lounge_visibility.status: VERIFIED - Kelly (Pro) sees Pro Lounge, dpritzker (Comp Surfer admin) does NOT see Pro Lounge

message_routing.description: Messages from non-followers go to Requests folder
message_routing.status: VERIFIED - Backend correctly checks follow status and sets status_for_one/two to 'request' for non-followers

avatar_cache_busting.description: Avatar images include cache-busting query parameter
avatar_cache_busting.status: VERIFIED - All avatar images have ?t= or &t= parameter with timestamp

bugs_fixed.bug: Pro Lounge visible to Comp Surfer admin users
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Backend messages.py line 479 used 'is_admin' as fallback for Pro Lounge access
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to only check for ['Pro', 'God'] roles without admin fallback

bugs_fixed.bug: Frontend showed Pro Lounge to any admin
bugs_fixed.root_cause: MessagesPage.js getFolders() used isAdmin as fallback when not masked
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use isProRole(roleToCheck) only, removing admin fallback
